Typedef Documentation

◆ ExplicitRewriteFunctionDescriptor

typedef ExplicitRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::Function, llvm::Function, &llvm::Module::getFunction> llvm::SymbolRewriter::ExplicitRewriteFunctionDescriptor

Represents a rewrite for an explicitly named (function) symbol. Both the source function name and target function name of the transformation are explicitly spelt out.

Definition at line 186 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ ExplicitRewriteGlobalVariableDescriptor

typedef ExplicitRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::GlobalVariable, llvm::GlobalVariable, &llvm::Module::getGlobalVariable> llvm::SymbolRewriter::ExplicitRewriteGlobalVariableDescriptor

Represents a rewrite for an explicitly named (global variable) symbol. Both the source variable name and target variable name are spelt out. This applies only to module level variables.

Definition at line 194 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ ExplicitRewriteNamedAliasDescriptor

typedef ExplicitRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::NamedAlias, llvm::GlobalAlias, &llvm::Module::getNamedAlias> llvm::SymbolRewriter::ExplicitRewriteNamedAliasDescriptor

Represents a rewrite for an explicitly named global alias. Both the source and target name are explicitly spelt out.

Definition at line 201 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ PatternRewriteFunctionDescriptor

typedef PatternRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::Function, llvm::Function, &llvm::Module::getFunction, &llvm::Module::functions> llvm::SymbolRewriter::PatternRewriteFunctionDescriptor

Represents a rewrite for a regular expression based pattern for functions. A pattern for the function name is provided and a transformation for that pattern to determine the target function name create the rewrite rule.

Definition at line 209 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ PatternRewriteGlobalVariableDescriptor

typedef PatternRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::GlobalVariable, llvm::GlobalVariable, &llvm::Module::getGlobalVariable, &llvm::Module::globals> llvm::SymbolRewriter::PatternRewriteGlobalVariableDescriptor

Represents a rewrite for a global variable based upon a matching pattern. Each global variable matching the provided pattern will be transformed as described in the transformation pattern for the target. Applies only to module level variables.

Definition at line 219 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ PatternRewriteNamedAliasDescriptor

typedef PatternRewriteDescriptor<RewriteDescriptor::Type::NamedAlias, llvm::GlobalAlias, &llvm::Module::getNamedAlias, &llvm::Module::aliases> llvm::SymbolRewriter::PatternRewriteNamedAliasDescriptor

PatternRewriteNamedAliasDescriptor - represents a rewrite for global aliases which match a given pattern. The provided transformation will be applied to each of the matching names.

Definition at line 228 of file SymbolRewriter.cpp.

◆ RewriteDescriptorList

typedef iplist<RewriteDescriptor> llvm::SymbolRewriter::RewriteDescriptorList

Definition at line 89 of file SymbolRewriter.h.
